title: Test-to-Review Handoff
description: Test agent output consumed by the review agent. Reports which developer-believed properties were confirmed, falsified, or inconclusive, and documents any bugs found with minimal counterexamples.

handoff_type.description: Handoff type identifier. Always 'test_to_review' for this schema.

total.description: Total number of tests run (including dev's unit tests + new tests).

skipped.description: Number of tests skipped (with reason noted in remaining_risks).

coverage_delta.description: Change in code coverage from this test pass. Format: '+X.X%' or '-X.X%' or 'N/A if no coverage tool configured'.

property_verification.description: Results of testing the developer's properties_believed. Each property is confirmed (passed), falsified (disproven — this is a real bug), or inconclusive (couldn't determine).

confirmed.description: Properties from the dev handoff that passed testing. These are verified truths about the implementation.

falsified.description: Properties that were DISPROVEN by testing. Each of these represents a real bug that needs fixing. Cross-reference with bugs_found for details.

inconclusive.description: Properties that couldn't be definitively confirmed or falsified. Include reasoning in remaining_risks.

bugs_found.description: Bugs discovered during testing. Each bug includes a minimal counterexample — the smallest input that triggers the failure.

severity.description: Bug severity. critical: data loss or security vulnerability. high: feature broken. medium: feature degraded. low: cosmetic or minor.

description.description: Clear description of the bug and its impact.

location.description: File path and function/line where the bug occurs.

counterexample.description: MINIMAL input or scenario that triggers the bug. Smallest possible reproduction case.

suggested_fix.description: Suggested approach to fix the bug. Be specific enough that the dev agent can act on it.

test_files_created.description: Paths to test files created by the test agent.

remaining_risks.description: Risks that couldn't be fully mitigated through testing. Include untestable scenarios, environment-dependent behaviors, and performance concerns.

recommended_focus_for_reviewer.description: Single most important thing the reviewer should examine. Saves the reviewer from having to re-prioritize everything. Be specific: 'the token refresh race condition in src/auth/tokens.ts:45-67 — test is inconclusive'.

tokens_used.description: Total tokens consumed by the test agent during this stage.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this handoff was produced.
